name: Yuna Saltis
rank: Memory Architect (specialist — designs and performs memory erasure contracts)
sd_appearance: Tiefling woman, approximately 4 feet tall, stands with her back against the dark stone wall of the Undercity. Pale lavender skin, her horns curling gently above her temples, a long tail twitching behind her. Her dark eyes, with no visible iris differentiation, seem to absorb the dim light of the city. Wearing black shadow-woven clothing, lotus flower motifs in black glass twinkle subtly against her attire. A concealed knife rests at her waist, and multiple memory vials adorn her outfit as jewellery. One distinctive visual detail — a pair of black-leather gloves covers her slender hands completely, a silent testament to her profession as a Memory Architect.
faction_visual: black shadow-woven clothing, lotus flower motifs in black glass, memory vials as jewellery
style_note: quiet in a way that feels engineered — black-on-black with glass-bead accessories
